enrichment.summary: Kyle films a short morning vlog from his Boulder apartment, mentions smoking weed with his roommate, talks about his plans to work on his YouTube page and website, notes he doesn't have to work that day due to cancellations, and discusses expanding his diet beyond oatmeal with pancake mix, cereal, and tater tots.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: wants to expand beyond oatmeal and eat more vegetables; acknowledges he's been losing weight
relieved to have a day off due to client cancellations

transcript.text: Hello, so this video is living in Boulder V-Log for the 27th. That was yesterday.
I just woke God up. It's like 9 something.
My computer has to do some kind of thing.
So I'm smoking bong hits because my roommate gave me a bunch of weed.
That's what's left from what he gave me yesterday. He gives me weed every weekend.
And so, yeah, I think I'm going to finish this one page I'm working on.
Then I can get going on the YouTube page. It'll be interesting.
And then after that, I think I'm going to put the actual website together.
All the pages I made, attach them. That'll be fun.
But it's a nice one day, so I work all day.
I don't work today because the put people canceled, so I get to work on my porch all day, which is fun.
And, yes, I'm excited because I'm all refreshed.
I had a different breakfast today than normal.
I went to the supermarket and expanded the foods that I have.
I got a bunch of pancake mix and Cheerio cereal, which that's what I had this morning.
Yeah, so now it's not just oatmeal.
And that's all I can think of about how I expanded.
There's a few other things. I got some tater tots. Those are good.
I had those for dinner last night.
But I was really groggy this morning, so I think the healthiest thing is just the canned vegetables.
But I've been smoking a lot of weed, you know, it kind of gives you the munchies.
So, okay, I'm going to get back to my life.
All right, peace out.
Peace out.
